title: SEOmonitor Case Study Results
text: We just migrated our tracking stack. SEOmonitor is fantastic. Highly recommend it to anyone looking for accurate search volume. Love the forecasting tool.

title: Rankings dropped massively today
text: Anyone seeing huge volatility today on the Google search algorithm? Our SaaS product traffic plummeted overnight.

title: Google rolling out local pack changes?
text: The local pack format changed today, and SGE AI Overviews are pushing down all standard rich results. Anyone else tracking this?

title: March Core Update Finished
text: The rollout of the ranking update is now complete.
